top_findings: Thin content: single indexable marketing page, no blog/docs/use-case/About
Weak E-E-A-T: no About/company/author info or trust markers
Partial security headers: only HSTS present
Soft-404: unknown routes return login shell, not a 404
quick_wins: Keyword title + canonical + Open Graph + Twitter card (done)

findings.title: Partial security headers
findings.description: Only HSTS is set on responses.
findings.recommendation: Add X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, X-Frame-Options/CSP frame-ancestors, and Referrer-Policy via next.config headers().

findings.title: Soft-404 on unknown routes
findings.description: Unknown paths resolve to the login shell via the auth proxy rather than a real 404.
findings.recommendation: Serve a proper not-found with a 404 status for unmatched routes.

findings.title: Thin content footprint
findings.description: Single indexable content page; no blog/docs/use-case pages targeting search queries.
findings.recommendation: Add 2-3 use-case landing pages and optionally /blog or /docs targeting 'AI form builder', 'MCP forms', etc.

findings.title: Weak E-E-A-T signals
findings.description: No About page, company/team info, testimonials, or sameAs social links.
findings.recommendation: Add an About page + trust markers and sameAs on Organization schema.

findings.title: Dual H1 on login layout
findings.description: The login split-screen renders two H1s.
findings.recommendation: Demote the marketing aside heading to h2/p. Low priority; login is not an index target.

findings.title: Missing sameAs / breadcrumbs
findings.description: Organization has no sameAs; no BreadcrumbList.
findings.recommendation: Add sameAs once social profiles exist; add BreadcrumbList if page hierarchy deepens.

findings.title: No field data
findings.description: Near-zero traffic means no CrUX field CWV.
findings.recommendation: Run a Lighthouse lab pass; revisit CrUX once traffic accrues.

findings.title: No llms.txt
findings.recommendation: Add an llms.txt route and exclude it from the auth proxy.

findings.title: Limited citable content
findings.description: Thin content limits citable passages for AI engines.
findings.recommendation: The content-depth work doubles as AI-search improvement.

findings.title: Alt text for future imagery
findings.recommendation: Add descriptive alt to future screenshots/marketing images.
